title: Server Optimized
description: Server Optimized is modpack made to improve server performance (it's also useable on client)
body:
What this modpack gives you?

Performance

Optimize server performance with this pack, increasing TPS and minimizing resource consumption.

Vanilla Feel

Server Optimized is a clean foundation, perfect for vanilla servers needing a boost, and adaptable as a base for other server types.

Bug fixes

This modpack includes Debugify with fixes over 70 bugs.

NO CHAT REPORTS

In this modpack you'll find No Chat Reports so you and your players can feel safe knowing Mojang's moderation doesn't have power on your server

Redstone optimization

Thanks to Alternate Current redstone is now 20 times faster while maintaining a high level of Vanilla parity.
